en-US.title: Karna — AI Assistant
en-US.subtitle: Your personal AI agent
en-US.description:
Karna is a self-hosted AI assistant that connects to your existing tools and services. Have natural conversations via text or voice, automate tasks, and build custom skills — all powered by your choice of AI models (Claude, GPT-4, or local models via Ollama).

Key features:
• Voice conversations with real-time speech recognition
• Chat history with persistent memory
• 97+ built-in tools for productivity
• Integrations: GitHub, Google Drive, Notion, Slack, Spotify, iCloud
• Skills marketplace — browse and install community skills
• Multi-agent workflows — automate complex tasks
• End-to-end encrypted connection to your self-hosted gateway
• Privacy-first: your data stays on your infrastructure

Karna requires a self-hosted gateway (available at github.com/MukundaKatta/karna). The mobile app is a thin client that connects to your instance.

This app is for users running their own Karna gateway. A demo instance is provided for App Review.
en-US.releaseNotes: Initial release of Karna mobile — voice and text conversations with your self-hosted AI agent.

review.notes: Karna is a self-hosted AI assistant client. For review, please use the provided demo credentials which connect to a pre-configured gateway instance. Voice input requires microphone permission. To test: 1) Launch app and log in with demo credentials, 2) Type a message or tap the mic icon to speak, 3) The assistant will respond via the connected gateway.
